# kSecTrustEvaluationDate

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the time that the trust evaluation took place.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecTrustEvaluationDate: CFString
```

## Discussion

This key is present after the results become available from performing the trust evaluation. The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFDate] object representing when the evaluation took place.
title: kSecTrustEvaluationDate
